name: orichalcum-pulse
short_effect: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
effect_text: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
flavor_text: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
